zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Bulmer I於大約1285年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾布爾莫時，他的父親John de Bulmer115歲，母親Alice Topcliffe71歲。他去世於1356年6月之前在英國英格蘭越可爾維爾頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾米德萊斯布盧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bulmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Durham): habitational name from either of two places called Bulmer, in the North Yorkshire and Essex, or from Boulmer in Northumberland. The Yorkshire place, recorded in Domesday Book as Bolemere, is named in Old English with bula ‘bull’ + mere ‘lake’, as is Boulmer; the Essex placename, found in early records as Bulenemera, is from bulena (genitive plural of bula) + mere ‘lake’.

variants.name: Bolmer
meanings: Dutch: probably from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldemar, composed of the elements bald ‘bold’ + mar ‘famous’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Bulmer I was born about 1285, in Bulmer, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Bulmer, was 115 and his mother, Alice Topcliffe, was 71. He died before June 1356, in Wilton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Middlesbrough, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Bulmer I est né environ 1285, à Bulmer, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Bulmer, avait 115 ans et sa mère, Alice Topcliffe, avait 71 ans. Il est décédé avant juin 1356, à Wilton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Middlesbrough, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Bulmer Iが約1285年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアブルマーで生まれた時，父John de Bulmerは115歳，母Alice Topcliffeは71歳であった。彼は1356年6月以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウィルトンで死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアミッドレスブロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Bulmer I(이)가 대략 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 버머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Bulmer(은)는 115세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Topcliffe(은)는 71세였다. 그는 1356년 6월 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 윌턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 미들레스브루그h에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Bulmer I родился около 1285 г. в местности булмир, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Bulmer было 115 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Topcliffe, 71. Он умер перед июнь 1356 г. в местности уилтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности миддлесброую, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
